case_title: AHMET TASCI VS. BAY ALARM COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TASCI, AHMET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY ALARM COMPANY $390.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ON APR-24-2024 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF AHMET TASCI IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAY ALARM COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALLED 4/23/24 REQUESTING MATTER TO BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY ALARM COMPANY HEARING SET FOR APR-24-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $130 SERVED DEC-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAY ALARM COMPANY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,645.00 FILED BY TASCI, AHMET AS TO DEFENDANT BAY ALARM COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY TASCI, AHMET

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-15-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AHMET TASCI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAY ALARM COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
